tools.name: super_memory_remember
tools.description: Save a memory through Super Memory canonical-first layer order. Supports defer=True for batch queuing.

tools.name: super_memory_remember_batch
tools.description: Save multiple memories through the same canonical-first layer order; partial failures stay per item.

tools.name: super_memory_show
tools.description: Show a memory by id across derived Super Memory layers without changing canonical markdown.

tools.name: super_memory_context
tools.description: Get recent or query-relevant Super Memory context from the merged layer view.

tools.name: super_memory_todo
tools.description: Save a TODO memory through canonical-first layer order.

tools.name: super_memory_auto
tools.description: Extract simple memory candidates from text and optionally save them canonical-first.

tools.name: super_memory_stats
tools.description: Alias of status for neural-memory-style stats consumers.

tools.name: super_memory_diagnostics
tools.description: Phase 8 diagnostics dashboard for canonical-first, sqlite, graph, lifecycle, and safe optional states.

tools.name: super_memory_cross_layer_health
tools.description: Audit cross-layer consistency: canonical markdown rows, projection orphans, content drift, and pending sync.

tools.name: super_memory_backfill_markdown_sqlite
tools.description: Admin repair: backfill missing workspace_markdown SQLite rows from existing derived-layer records.

tools.name: super_memory_memory_slot_contract
tools.description: Run Phase 8 memory-slot replacement contract: save/search/get/show/graph projection.

tools.name: super_memory_mcp_contract
tools.description: Verify MCP stdio tools/list exposure for required Super Memory tools.

tools.name: super_memory_supervised_runtime_smoke
tools.description: Run local supervised no-live-config Phase 8 runtime smoke.

tools.name: super_memory_health
tools.description: Check Super Memory consistency guardrails: canonical-first and workspace markdown enabled.

tools.name: super_memory_auto_compact
tools.description: Auto-compact soft-deleted records when ratio exceeds threshold (default 20%). Safe by default (dry_run=True).

tools.name: super_memory_cleanup
tools.description: Official safe SQLite cleanup: migrations, derived views, FTS rebuilds, transactions, optional VACUUM.

tools.name: super_memory_expire_by_age
tools.description: Soft-delete memories past their expires_days TTL (e.g. todos, ephemeral notes). Safe by default (dry_run=True).

tools.name: super_memory_expire_by_valid_until
tools.description: Soft-delete memories past their valid_until window (scheduled rules, time-bounded API keys). Safe by default (dry_run=True).

tools.name: super_memory_sanitize_prompt
tools.description: Sanitize recall/prompt text by redacting common secrets and normalizing whitespace/control characters.

tools.name: super_memory_sanitize_auto_capture
tools.description: Sanitize text before auto-capture storage.

tools.name: super_memory_normalize_memory
tools.description: Normalize a memory payload schema without saving it.

tools.name: super_memory_recall
tools.description: Recall memories from Super Memory layers.

tools.name: super_memory_prefetch
tools.description: Merged/deduped Super Memory recall for prompt prefetch.

tools.name: super_memory_sync_turn
tools.description: Save a compact multi-agent conversation turn event.

tools.name: super_memory_durable_pack
tools.description: Install curated shared/project durable memories for OpenClaw agents, then auto-qualify and debug recall.

tools.name: super_memory_durable_pack_status
tools.description: Audit whether the curated OpenClaw durable memory pack is installed, qualified, and duplicate-free.

tools.name: super_memory_durable_pack_audit
tools.description: Deep audit the OpenClaw durable memory pack; with fix=true, soft-delete duplicates and backfill SQLite-only canonical rows.

tools.name: super_memory_memory_search
tools.description: OpenClaw memory_search-compatible recall payload from Super Memory.

tools.name: super_memory_memory_get
tools.description: OpenClaw memory_get-compatible read from Super Memory virtual paths or workspace files.

tools.name: super_memory_promote
tools.description: Promote a memory to MEMORY.md and the matching register.

tools.name: super_memory_status
tools.description: Show Super Memory local status.
